facebook.caption: Phu Quoc nights hit different when you're up high. Rosso Sky Bar & Lounge in Dương Đông is where the island's nightlife actually lives. Rooftop views, cocktails in hand, the kind of energy that makes you stay for one more round. 4.3 stars from 78 reviews. The vibe earns it. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Lights coming on across Dương Đông, cocktail in frame, music picking up. This is Rosso Sky Bar & Lounge and Phu Quoc nights just got a whole lot better. Tag your travel buddy.

instagram.caption: Phu Quoc nightlife finally has a rooftop. Rosso Sky Bar & Lounge, Dương Đông. 4.3 stars. One more round always wins. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Rooftop. Cocktails. Dương Đông lit up below. Rosso Sky Bar is the move tonight.
